display_text: Enigma Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Black Hole to deal percentage-based Max Health damage and pull units towards it from a 1200 AoE. This upgrade counters high-health tanks and mobile heroes by ensuring they cannot easily escape the ultimate's pull, turning Black Hole into a devastating teamfight control tool.
search_text: Enigma Aghanim Scepter Black Hole pull high-health tanks anti-mobility teamfight control

display_text: Enigma Aghanim's Shard: Increases Malefice stun duration and spawns Eidolons with each stun. This upgrade counters squishy or mobile heroes by amplifying crowd control and providing additional pushing power without relying on Eidolon multiplication.
search_text: Enigma Aghanim Shard Malefice stun Eidolons anti-mobile crowd control pushing power
